chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 1362 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.12.2025. Mr. Jehanzeb Ali Dahri, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G for State. = For reasons to be recorded, instant bail application is allowed and the applicant Muhammad Rafique is granted post arrest bail in Crime No.218/2025 registered at P.S Hali Road, Hyderabad for offence u/s 8 SPPMSS and Use of Gutka & Mainpuris Act, 2019, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Lac) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. JUDGE Tufail
